  "findings": [
    "Kick-out flashing is missing at the roof-to-wall intersection, violating proper water-resistive barrier (WRB) and flashing integration sequence."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop siding installation at the roof-wall intersection.",
    "Install a preformed kick-out flashing diverter integrated behind the WRB and over the roof step flashing.",
    "Ensure the WRB shingle-laps over the top flange of the kick-out flashing before proceeding with siding."
  ],
  "rationale": "The kick-out flashing must be integrated with the WRB and step flashing before siding installation can proceed. Omitting it allows water running down the roof-wall intersection to penetrate behind the siding and WRB, causing severe structural rot.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703.2",
    "IRC R703.4",
    "IRC R703.8"
  ]
}
